{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324000728709C504362819293AEB0"}"},"total":2335},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7182393892531520293","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔很棒，事业线和感情线都兼顾得很好，作者对于某些不可言说的方面的度掌握的很好，不会让人觉得反感，是我目前为止最喜欢的一本宝可梦了。作者写得让人很舒服，事件间的承接很自然。感情线比较细腻，有点偏向言情但不会让人觉得过；事业线也有，热血的战斗也有，我觉得是一部相对受重面较广的文，里面符合男女生口味的都有，非常非常赞"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672281499,"group_id":"7171748837252402215","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/VfpM09VkhOdabsMqUiEIOERarHP+nuv94G2/edDGa0","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6a45c22cafe043f48309430c503135d5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883471&x-signature=LKEeCBx5I8KKlaT2UHbHUfpR%2BBs%3D","user_id":"4406493050060276","user_name":"唐涵曦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4406493050060276","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171748837252402215","book_info":{"abstract":"【阅读须知：本书偏日常，慢节奏，有女主，主打感情文，二次元日漫浓度较高，有系统，但作用不大，自己收服的御三家，想看无脑爽文和战斗龙傲天的请去隔壁】
程天
男
24岁
作为一个宝可梦忠实粉丝，外加社会的社畜。当你在穿越之后，会开启一段怎样的人生？
程天看了看自己腰间挂着的六颗精灵球，那温柔的声音仿佛还回荡在耳边。
“阿天，我爱你。”
他吐出了一口气，目光已经渐渐坚定了起来。

:[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":30,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1891,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24195,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":48780},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1672281751,"author_reply_time":1672281756,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7196741626323010361","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看(♥∀♥)，不仅是单女主，还有小精灵，是我找了好久的那种感情线事业线一起的宠物小精灵小说，不仅如此男女主的初始小精灵还是我很喜欢的仙子伊布和呱呱泡蛙。其他人物的小精灵搭配也很不错，特别是主角他们收服的小精灵都是我喜欢的那几个颜值与实力并存的小精灵。里面的每个角色也都灵活生动。简直是完美符合我最想看的几点。超期待后面剧情。
偷偷问一下呱呱泡蛙与它师傅的会重逢吗？还有可可多拉的复仇剧情会有吗？期待"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675622434,"group_id":"7171748837252402215","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0YC4Yir5BwFabOj2yrJ3wI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"435839490070152","user_name":"幻海城的叶苏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"435839490070152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171748837252402215","book_info":{"abstract":"【阅读须知：本书偏日常，慢节奏，有女主，主打感情文，二次元日漫浓度较高，有系统，但作用不大，自己收服的御三家，想看无脑爽文和战斗龙傲天的请去隔壁】
